hooks.command: node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.command)||"";if(/git\s+commit/.test(cmd)&&/(Co-Authored-By:\s*Claude|claude\.com\/claude-code|Generated with .*Claude|\bAnthropic\b)/i.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write("Blocked: commit message contains Claude/Anthropic attribution. Remove Co-Authored-By, Generated-with, and any Claude/Anthropic mention, then retry.\n");process.exit(2)}}catch(e){}process.exit(0)})'
